steps.title: Identify the grammatical requirement
steps.content: The blank needs a possessive pronoun that matches the number of its antecedent. The antecedent is “the North Sea,” which is singular.

steps.title: Apply the singular possessive form
steps.content: 'Its' is the singular possessive. 'It's' and 'they're' are verb contractions, and 'their' is plural—none of those fit the singular antecedent. That matches choice B — B is correct.
